description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in a medieval-style jester or performer outfit, featuring a hooded tunic split vertically into two contrasting halves. The left side of the tunic and hood is a deep red, while the right side is white, with a scalloped edge at the shoulders. The tunic is belted at the waist with a rope-like cord, and the figure wears fitted leggings that match the tunic's color scheme. The shoes are pointed and curled at the toes, reminiscent of traditional jester footwear. The face is exposed, with a neutral expression, and the hands and feet are visible, with no additional accessories or carried objects.
description: An adult figure in a medieval jester-style hooded tunic with pointed shoes and a rope belt, split into red and white halves. The outfit is detailed with scalloped edges and fitted leggings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split red and white hooded tunic, rope belt, exposed face, and pointed shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red hood draping down the back and the curled toe of the left shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the hood, the rope belt tied at the back, and the color split down the center.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the white hood and tunic half, as well as the curled toe of the right shoe.
attribute_clothing_type: medieval jester-style hooded tunic with rope belt and fitted leggings
